name: azure-estate-exporter
postCreateCommand: pwsh -NoProfile -Command "Install-Module -Name Pester,PSScriptAnalyzer -Force -SkipPublisherCheck -Scope CurrentUser" && curl -sSL https://github.com/Azure/aztfexport/releases/latest/download/aztfexport_$(uname -s)_amd64 -o /tmp/aztfexport && install -m 0755 /tmp/aztfexport /usr/local/bin/aztfexport || echo 'aztfexport install best-effort; install manually if missing.'
